# Singletrack Sessions — Episode
## Building Trails That Last (Fast Test)
Host: Maya
Guest: Liam

[00:00]
Maya: Welcome back to Singletrack Sessions. Today we're talking about building trails that last, and I'm joined by Liam, trail builder for the Cascadia Alliance. Liam, thanks for being here.
Liam: Thanks, Maya. Excited for this one.
Maya: Today's episode is sponsored by Strava. Strava is the home for athletes — track every ride, run, and swim. Try strava.com today.

[00:30]
Maya: Let's start with the basics. What's the most underrated piece of trail building?
Liam: Drainage is the single highest-leverage design choice on any trail. If water leaves on its own, the trail will last a decade.

[00:50]
Maya: That's it for today's fast episode of Singletrack Sessions. See you next time.
